NAME: Taiwan Precision Medicine Initiative
MANUAL_CITATION: Yang, H. C., Kwok, P. Y., Li, L. H., Liu, Y. M., Jong, Y. J., Lee, K. Y., ... & Wu, J. Y. (2025). The Taiwan Precision Medicine Initiative provides a cohort for large-scale studies. Nature, 1-34.
DESCRIPTION: The Taiwan Precision Medicine Initiative (TPMI) is a genomic research program designed toadvance precision healthcare. With over 500,000 Taiwanese residents already enrolled, TPMI maintains the mostcomprehensive dataset of genotypes and electronic medicalrecords for Han Chinese populations.
